overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a character in medieval attire approaching and ascending a large stone temple with red banners. The character climbs the main staircase and circles the upper terrace, showcasing detailed historic stone architecture in an overcast setting.

events.description: character reaches the top of the staircase and steps onto the upper platform

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the wide stone staircase toward the temple entrance, sword visible at hip

entered.detail: tall cylindrical stone tower with weathered gray blocks and red banners hanging from upper levels
three long crimson banners hanging vertically from the tower facade
wide curved stone steps leading up to the tower entrance
curved stone walls flanking both sides of the staircase

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a medieval character approaching a massive stone temple tower. The camera follows from behind as the character ascends the wide cobblestone staircase, with red banners visible high above against an overcast sky. The stone architecture shows detailed weathering and age as the character climbs toward the arched entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper temple terrace with arched walkways

events.description: turning right to walk along the curved upper terrace, moving away from the main entrance

agents.ego_description: circling the tower base on the upper terrace, examining the arched doorways and side passages

entered.detail: tall dark wooden doors set in rounded stone arches at the tower base
ornate carved stonework with geometric patterns above the arches
black wrought iron gate blocking a side passage in the building wing
simple wooden bench resting against the stone wall

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the character turns right to explore the curved upper terrace. The red banners disappear from view as the camera circles the tower, revealing detailed arched doorways with ornate stone carvings. A wooden bench and an iron gate become visible along the side passage as the character continues walking around the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a steady ascent of a massive temple tower to a detailed exploration of its upper terrace. It begins behind a medieval character climbing a wide cobblestone staircase, where weathered stone architecture and red banners stand out against an overcast sky. As the character reaches the top of the stairs, the camera shifts its trajectory to the right, moving away from the banners to follow the curve of the tower. The scene then opens up to reveal ornate stone carvings on arched doorways, passing a wooden bench and an iron gate along a side passage. The movement finally settles into a circling motion that showcases the intricate historic details of the upper structure.
